tools.name: get_fleet_vehicles
tools.description: Get all vehicles in the fleet, optionally filtered by status and location

tools.name: get_bookings
tools.description: Get bookings with optional filters for status, date range, and location

start_date.description: Filter bookings starting from this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

end_date.description: Filter bookings ending before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: get_recent_activity
tools.description: Get recent activity feed including bookings, payments, and other events

tools.name: getFleetMetrics
tools.description: Get fleet performance metrics including total vehicles, active bookings, revenue, and utilization over a specified timeframe and location

timeframe.description: The time period to analyze metrics for

tools.name: getLocationMetrics
tools.description: Get detailed metrics for a specific location or overview of all locations including vehicle count, revenue, utilization, and active bookings

location.description: Specific location to get metrics for (e.g., 'miami', 'scottsdale'), or leave empty for all locations

tools.name: getVehicleDetails
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific vehicle, optionally including recent booking history

vehicleName.description: Name or partial name of the vehicle to search for (e.g., 'Ferrari', 'Lamborghini Huracan')

includeBookings.description: Whether to include the last 10 bookings for this vehicle

tools.name: getCustomerProfile
tools.description: Get customer information and optionally their complete booking history

customerName.description: Full name or partial name of the customer

includeHistory.description: Whether to include full booking history

tools.name: checkAvailability
tools.description: Check if vehicles are available for a given date range, optionally filtered by vehicle name or location

vehicleName.description: Name of the vehicle to check availability for

tools.name: getRevenueAnalysis
tools.description: Analyze revenue for the fleet or a specific vehicle over a timeframe and location

vehicleName.description: Optional: specific vehicle name to analyze (leave empty for all vehicles)

tools.name: getTopPerformers
tools.description: Get top performing vehicles or customers based on revenue, utilization, or bookings

limit.description: Number of top performers to return (default: 5)

tools.name: searchBookings
tools.description: Search for bookings by status, date range, and location

status.description: Filter by booking status (leave empty for all)

daysRange.description: Number of days in the past to search (leave empty for all time)

tools.name: getDamageReports
tools.description: Get damage claim reports filtered by status and location

tools.name: getUpcomingMaintenance
tools.description: Get upcoming maintenance schedules within a specified number of days, optionally filtered by location

daysAhead.description: Number of days ahead to look for maintenance (default: 30)

tools.name: getCustomerLifetimeValue
tools.description: Get lifetime value and total bookings for a specific customer

customerName.description: Full or partial name of the customer

tools.name: getPaymentSummary
tools.description: Get payment summary including total payments, breakdown by status and method, and recent transactions

tools.name: getVaultDocuments
tools.description: Get documents from the vault filtered by category and status

tools.name: getDemandForecast
tools.description: Get AI-powered demand forecast with upcoming events data for a specific city and time period

days.description: Number of days to forecast (7, 14, or 30)

location.description: Alternative to city - filter by location

tools.name: getPricingRecommendation
tools.description: Get AI-powered pricing recommendation for a specific vehicle based on utilization, demand, and seasonal factors

vehicleName.description: Name or partial name of the vehicle to get pricing recommendation for

tools.name: getFleetPricingOverview
tools.description: Get comprehensive pricing overview for the entire fleet including average rates, utilization, and optimization recommendations

tools.name: getEventImpact
tools.description: Get information about how a specific event might impact rental demand and pricing

eventName.description: Name of the event to analyze (e.g., 'Super Bowl', 'Art Basel', 'Miami Grand Prix')

tools.name: getWeatherInfo
tools.description: Get weather information for a location (simulated for demo purposes)

tools.name: getCarJoke
tools.description: Get a random car-related joke to lighten the conversation

tools.name: getVehicleSpecs
tools.description: Get technical specifications for a specific vehicle model (Ferrari, Lamborghini, McLaren, Bugatti, Porsche, Rolls-Royce)

vehicleName.description: Name or model of the vehicle

tools.name: logFeedback
tools.description: Log user feedback when a feature doesn't work or isn't available. Use this when you can't fulfill a user's request.

keywords.description: Comma-separated keywords related to the feedback

rariResponse.description: Brief description of why this couldn't be fulfilled

tools.name: featureComingSoon
tools.description: Use when a user asks for a feature that isn't available yet. This logs the request and tells the user it's coming soon.

featureName.description: Name of the feature that's not yet available

userRequest.description: What the user specifically asked for

tools.name: getVehicleProfitLoss
tools.description: Get profit and loss analysis for vehicles including revenue, expenses, and profit margin. Can filter by specific vehicle, timeframe, or location. Use this when users ask about profitability, P/L, which vehicles make money, or financial performance.

vehicleName.description: Optional: specific vehicle name to analyze (e.g., 'Ferrari', 'Lamborghini')

tools.name: compareLocations
tools.description: Compare performance metrics between different fleet locations including revenue, utilization, vehicle count, and identify the top performer. Use this when users ask to compare Miami vs Scottsdale, which location is better, or location performance.

locations.description: Optional: comma-separated list of locations to compare

tools.name: getOutstandingBalances
tools.description: Get outstanding payment balances and overdue bookings. Shows who owes money, payment urgency, and total outstanding amounts. Use this when users ask 'who owes me money', 'outstanding balances', 'overdue payments', or 'pending payments'.

minAmount.description: Optional: minimum balance amount to include

tools.name: getIdleVehicles
tools.description: Find vehicles that haven't been booked recently. Includes recommendations for pricing adjustments or promotions. Use this when users ask about 'idle vehicles', 'vehicles not booked', 'sitting vehicles', or 'underutilized fleet'.

daysIdle.description: Number of days without booking to consider idle (default: 7)

tools.name: getCustomerSegments
tools.description: Get customer segmentation analysis including VIP, high-value, active, at-risk, and new customers based on booking history and lifetime value. Use this when users ask about 'VIP customers', 'top customers', 'customer segments', 'at-risk customers', or 'customer analysis'.

tools.name: getMultiLocationAvailability
tools.description: Check vehicle availability across all locations for a specific date range. Great for finding options when a customer is flexible on location. Use this when users ask 'what's available everywhere', 'availability across locations', or 'find me a car anywhere'.

tools.name: getRariInsights
tools.description: Get proactive AI-generated insights about fleet operations including utilization alerts, maintenance reminders, peak season notifications, and actionable recommendations. Use this when users ask 'any insights', 'what should I focus on', 'any issues', or 'recommendations'.
